services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete international logistics solutions designed for your peace of mind.
services.s1_desc: We connect Texas with Nicaragua and Venezuela with efficiency and security in every package.
services.s2_desc: We transport large volumes with specialized fleet and real-time tracking.
services.s3_desc: We pick up your package directly at your home or business anywhere in Texas.
services.s4_desc: Direct and secure service to Nicaragua with optimized delivery times.
services.s5_desc: Reliable shipments to Venezuela with specialized handling and personalized care.
services.s6_desc: Every shipment is protected and tracked from origin to final destination.

pricing.promo_note: Remember! Send 4 boxes and the 5th Small is completely FREE.
pricing.barrel_desc: Ideal for high-volume shipments to Nicaragua and Venezuela.
pricing.adv1_desc: Your cargo in the best hands

coverage.title: Our Texas Coverage
coverage.subtitle: We operate in the major cities across Texas. Your package, picked up at your door.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, transparent process designed for your convenience.
howItWorks.step1_desc: Contact us via WhatsApp or our form. We respond in minutes.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Our team goes directly to your Texas address to collect your package.
howItWorks.step3_desc: We review, pack, and sort your package with maximum care and professionalism.
howItWorks.step4_desc: Your package heads to Nicaragua or Venezuela with tracking at all times.
howItWorks.step5_desc: Your package arrives safely to your loved ones. Mission accomplished.

gallery.title: How We Work
gallery.subtitle: Real, professional, quality logistics in every operation.

whyUs.title: Why Choose Us?
whyUs.subtitle: Over 5,000 packages delivered back us up. Your trust is our greatest motivation.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Families and businesses that trust GO Logistics Express to connect with their loved ones.
testimonials.t1_text: Excellent service. They shipped my mom's boxes to Nicaragua and they arrived perfectly and in record time. Highly recommended!
testimonials.t2_text: The 5th box free promotion saved me a lot of money. The process was super easy and the service was very professional.
testimonials.t3_text: I've been shipping with them to Venezuela for years. Never had a problem. They are serious, punctual and very attentive.
testimonials.t4_text: They picked up at my house on time and tracking was impeccable. My family received everything in perfect condition.
testimonials.t5_text: The best shipping service I've found in Texas. Fair prices and top-notch service. I recommend them 100%!
